trigger_event: Enterprise clients need credible, measurable AI infrastructure improvement.
primary_kpi: Time to measurable customer outcome
workload_environment: watsonx enterprise AI platform and strategic customer solutions
boundary_waste_hypothesis: Model, runtime, infrastructure and workflow boundaries that reduce solution economics
desired_gain: Differentiate watsonx and strategic engagements through validated compute efficiency.
likely_blocker: Corporate development, legal, procurement, product finance, or ecosystem owner
likely_objection: The proposition may look like bespoke consulting rather than a scalable watsonx capability
response_angle: Position itriX one layer before the existing stack, isolate watsonx enterprise ai platform and strategic customer solutions, and prove one enterprise workload produces a repeatable value case, clear integration scope and defensible commercial path before proposing broader integration.
pitch_room_title: Turn Validated Compute Efficiency Into a watsonx Partnership and License Path
personalized_cta: Select one strategic watsonx customer workload
commercial_route: Confidential partnership briefing and NDA
department_confidence: Medium — public initiative aligned; exact reporting line and decision owner must be validated

slides.title: What We Heard
slides.body: You are trying to differentiate watsonx and strategic engagements through validated compute efficiency. What we heard: We are exploring a strategic enterprise AI capability that can produce measurable infrastructure value.

slides.title: Why It Matters
slides.body: Why it matters: Enterprise clients need credible, measurable AI infrastructure improvement. The decision will be judged first on time to measurable customer outcome, supported by deployment margin; customer roi; repeatability; license potential.

slides.title: Hidden Layer
slides.body: Hidden layer: Model, runtime, infrastructure and workflow boundaries that reduce solution economics. The hypothesis is that part of the burden is fixed before the current compiler, runtime, device or infrastructure layer begins optimizing.

slides.title: Where itriX Fits
slides.body: Where itriX may fit: Strategic evaluation → PoC → license-out. Start with a bounded review of watsonx enterprise ai platform and strategic customer solutions and produce watsonx commercial-pathway memo.

slides.title: Proof Plan
slides.body: Proof plan: One enterprise workload produces a repeatable value case, clear integration scope and defensible commercial path. No broad claim is made until the agreed workload and baseline validate it.

slides.title: Now vs NDA
slides.body: Public: strategic objective, target platform, and partnership hypothesis. NDA: field of use, proof scope, commercial terms, exclusivity, IP, and integration roadmap.

slides.title: Next Step
slides.body: Suggested next step: Select one strategic watsonx customer workload.
